summary: Iteration 11: All 12 requested features tested and verified. Backend 25/25 pytest tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: 403 error in console logs - external third-party API issue, non-blocking

seed_data_creation: Test user created during backend testing for authenticated endpoint tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 11 features fully working. Backend APIs: store items (6), rewards system (balance/claim/history), file upload (base64), auth (register/login), membership status. Frontend pages: Asma Al-Husna (99 names with search), Store (6 items with categories), Rewards (login prompt for unauth), More page (Rewards+Store cards + 9 Islamic tools), Sohba (posts grid + create button), Bottom nav (5 tabs).

backend_apis.GET /api/store/items: ✅ Returns 6 store items with correct structure
backend_apis.POST /api/auth/register: ✅ Creates new user and returns token
backend_apis.GET /api/membership/status (with auth): ✅ Returns membership status (free plan for new user)

frontend_pages.asma_al_husna: ✅ Page loads with 99 names grid, search toggle works
frontend_pages.store: ✅ Page loads with 6 items, 7 category filters
frontend_pages.rewards: ✅ Shows login prompt for unauthenticated users
frontend_pages.more: ✅ Shows المكافآت and المتجر cards + 9 Islamic tools in grid
frontend_pages.sohba: ✅ Page loads with posts grid (8 posts) and create post FAB

ui_screenshots: .screenshots/store_page.png - Store with 6 items and category filters
